query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.slug, p.category, pv.id as variant_id, pv.sku, pv.color, pv.ean13, pv.pricePartnerHT FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%Kos%' OR p.name LIKE '%KOS%' ORDER BY p.id, pv.id;
